Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We have the following tables: - Orders: gives the order creation event. - Order Lines: gives picking events for each item. Note that an order may have multiple items, and each item is picked at a different time by different pickers. - Delivery: gives dispatch and arrival events. Note that an order may have multiple deliveries (split shipments). - Invoice: gives invoice issued events. An order may have multiple invoices. - Payments: gives payment received events for each invoice.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets define the activities we can create: From Orders: - Order Created: timestamp = order_date, resource = sales_person_id From Order Lines: - For each line item (each row in Order Lines) we can create an event Item Picked. Since the picking of each item is a separate activity, we will create one event per line item. From Delivery: - We have two events per delivery: dispatch and arrival. So we can create two events per delivery record: Order Dispatched and Order Arrived. From Invoice: - Invoice Issued: one event per invoice. From Payments: - Payment Received: one event per payment.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets define the columns for the event log: - Case ID: order_id - Activity Name: one of the defined activities - Timestamp: the date/time of the event - Resource: the responsible entity - Other Attributes: ... We will structure the event log with these columns: Case ID, Activity Name, Timestamp, Resource, Attributes where Attributes is a string like key1: value1, key2: value2.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets check for missing orders: The Orders table has order_ids: 1001, 1002, 1003, 1004, 1005. Order 1004 does not have any order lines, deliveries, invoices, or payments. So we will only have the Order Created event for order 1004.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Resource: - Order Created: sales_person_id - Item Picked: picker_id - Order Dispatched: carrier_id - Order Arrived: carrier_id - Invoice Issued: billing_person_id - Payment Received: none

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets start with Order 1001: Order Created ... Item Picked two events ... Delivery Dispatch and Arrival ... Invoice Issued ... Payment Received. Similarly for other orders: 1002 with two deliveries two invoices two payments, 1003, 1004 only created, 1005.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must be cautious with the chronological order. We will sort the events for each order by timestamp. Lets create a list of events and then sort by Case ID and Timestamp. Now, we have all the events. We need to sort them by Case ID and then by Timestamp.
